ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Machine learning framework used */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Last update date of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training run */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being trained */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration used for the run */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the training run */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the training run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the training run (e.g., completed, failed, pending) */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training environment */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worker (if applicable) */,
  "parameter_server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter server (if applicable) */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the training run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_runs_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES workers ("worker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_runs_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES training_environments ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_runs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_runs_parameter_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_server_id") REFERENCES parameter_servers ("ps_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_runs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the configuration */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used for the configuration (stored as JSON) */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training environment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "optimizer" TEXT /* Optimizer used */,
  "loss_function" TEXT /* Loss function used */,
  "metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics tracked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training run the metric belongs to */,
  "step" INTEGER /* Step number of the training process */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the metric */,
  "elapsed_time_sec" REAL /* Elapsed time in seconds */,
  "loss" REAL /* Loss value of the metric */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worker (if applicable) */,
  "parameter_server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter server (if applicable) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy at this step */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision at this step */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall at this step */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score at this step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_parameter_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_server_id") REFERENCES parameter_servers ("ps_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES training_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES workers ("worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_environments" (
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training environment */,
  "env_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the environment */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of environment (e.g., local, distributed) */,
  "hardware_details" TEXT /* Details about the hardware used */,
  "software_details" TEXT /* Details about the software environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workers" (
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each worker */,
  "env_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment the worker belongs to */,
  "worker_name" TEXT /* Name of the worker */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the worker */,
  "hardware_details" TEXT /* Details about the hardware used by the worker */,
  "software_details" TEXT /* Details about the software environment used by the worker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("worker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workers_env_id FOREIGN KEY ("env_id") REFERENCES training_environments ("env_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_servers" (
  "ps_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter server */,
  "env_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment the parameter server belongs to */,
  "ps_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter server */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the parameter server */,
  "hardware_details" TEXT /* Details about the hardware used by the parameter server */,
  "software_details" TEXT /* Details about the software environment used by the parameter server */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ps_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_servers_env_id FOREIGN KEY ("env_id") REFERENCES training_environments ("env_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intra_op_parallelism" (
  "parallelism_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intra-op parallelism setting */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training run the parallelism setting belongs to */,
  "threads" INTEGER /* Number of threads used for intra-op parallelism */,
  "hardware_details" TEXT /* Details about the hardware used for intra-op parallelism */,
  "software_details" TEXT /* Details about the software environment used for intra-op parallelism */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parallelism_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intra_op_parallelism_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES training_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inter_op_parallelism" (
  "parallelism_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inter-op parallelism setting */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training run the parallelism setting belongs to */,
  "threads" INTEGER /* Number of threads used for inter-op parallelism */,
  "hardware_details" TEXT /* Details about the hardware used for inter-op parallelism */,
  "software_details" TEXT /* Details about the software environment used for inter-op parallelism */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parallelism_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inter_op_parallelism_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES training_runs ("run_id")
)
